query:
SELECT
                 subject_did             AS "subject_did!: String",
                 subject_uri,
                 action_type             AS "action_type!: String",
                 reason_codes            AS "reason_codes!: String",
                 triggered_by_policy_rule AS "triggered_by_policy_rule!: String",
                 resolution
               FROM pending_policy_actions
               WHERE id = ?1
